title: fix(deps): update module github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2 to v2.13.2

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>onsi/ginkgo (github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2)</summary>

### [`v2.13.2`](https://togithub.com/onsi/ginkgo/releases/tag/v2.13.2)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/onsi/ginkgo/compare/v2.13.1...v2.13.2)

#### 2.13.2

##### Fixes

-   Fix file handler leak ([#​1309](https://togithub.com/onsi/ginkgo/issues/1309)) \[[`e2e81c8`](https://togithub.com/onsi/ginkgo/commit/e2e81c8)]
-   Avoid allocations with `(*regexp.Regexp).MatchString` ([#​1302](https://togithub.com/onsi/ginkgo/issues/1302)) \[[`3b2a2a7`](https://togithub.com/onsi/ginkgo/commit/3b2a2a7)]

</details>
